$comment: Behavior contract: runtime behaviors every framework adapter must test, keyed by component. The check-behavior-coverage.mjs script asserts each id is tagged (// @behavior <id>) in every framework's spec file, so behavioral parity is enforced the way shape parity is by the type contract. This is a ratchet: it locks behaviors currently covered in all three adapters. Add ids here as you backfill divergent coverage (see the gap report in the Gap-3 commit).

button.describe: renders with default props/inputs without error
is disabled / aria-disabled when disabled is true
renders a spinner while loading is true
emits a click event when not disabled
does not emit a click event when disabled

dialog.describe: shows the modal (showModal) when open becomes true
applies the size class to the dialog/panel
sets aria-modal on the dialog element
the close button closes the dialog / emits open=false

menu.describe: menu is not rendered until the trigger is activated
opens the menu and renders items on trigger click
applies the variant-* class to the menu panel
selecting a menu item closes the menu
a disabled item is marked disabled and cannot be triggered

select.describe: shows the placeholder when no value is selected
is disabled when the disabled prop is true
emits / calls back on selection change

combobox.describe: filters options as the user types
navigates options with ArrowDown and selects with Enter
sets aria-expanded=true when the listbox is open

accordion.describe: expands a collapsed item on click
collapses an expanded item on a second click
a disabled item does not toggle on click
allows multiple items open at once in multi mode
opening one item collapses the other in single mode

alert.describe: renders the dismiss button when dismissible
emits/calls back when the dismiss button is clicked
sets aria-live according to variant severity

avatar.describe: shows name initials when no image src is given
uses the name as the accessible label when no alt

badge.describe: renders with default props without error

breadcrumbs.describe: renders a nav landmark with an aria-label
non-current items with href render as links
applies the is-current class to the current item

chat.describe: inline variant renders without overlay chrome
popup variant renders the floating bubble
renders a Send button while status is idle
renders a Stop button while status is streaming
emits send with the typed text on Enter
emits stop when Stop is clicked while streaming

checkbox.describe: toggles and emits/calls back on click
is disabled when the disabled prop is true
sets aria-invalid / invalid state when invalid

code-block.describe: shows the language label when no filename
shows the filename label instead of language when set
renders a copy button when copyable
shows line numbers when showLineNumbers is true
shows copied state after clicking copy

drawer.describe: shows the modal (showModal) when open becomes true
the close button closes the drawer / emits open=false
sets aria-modal on the dialog element

icon.describe: renders the glyph for the named icon
decorative by default (hidden from assistive tech)
role=img + aria-label when a label is provided

input.describe: is disabled when the disabled prop is true
emits/calls back as the user types

pagination.describe: disables prev/first controls on the first page
disables next/last controls on the last page
marks the current page with aria-current
emits/calls back the page on a page-button click

radio.describe: is checked when the group value matches

radio-group.describe: checks the radio matching the value
emits/calls back when a radio is selected
sets aria-invalid / invalid state when invalid

skeleton.describe: drops the is-animated class when animated=false
circular variant derives height from width

stepper.describe: shows the first step panel by default
sets aria-selected on the active step
clicking a step navigates to it
clicking a disabled step does nothing

table.describe: renders a sort button when sortable
renders a row checkbox when selectable
shows the empty state when empty=true

tabs.describe: selects/shows the first tab by default
switches the active tab on click
a disabled tab cannot be selected

textarea.describe: is disabled when the disabled prop is true
emits/calls back as the user types

toast.describe: the dismiss button removes the toast
applies the position class to the container

toggle.describe: toggles and emits/calls back on click
is disabled when the disabled prop is true

tooltip.describe: shows on hover/mouseenter after the delay
